title: 分析评估客户财务状况 / Analysing Financial Status
summary: 系统分析现金流、净值、保障缺口与风险承受,对照目标识别盈余/缺口,作为方案依据。 / Systematically analyse cash flow, net worth, protection gaps and risk appetite against goals to identify surpluses/shortfalls as the basis for solutions.

sections.heading: 分析维度
sections.body: 现金流(收支结余)、资产负债与净值、现有保障与投资、风险承受与目标的匹配。

sections.heading: Dimensions
sections.body: Cash flow, assets/liabilities and net worth, existing cover/investments, and risk-goal alignment.

sections.heading: 识别缺口
sections.body: 保障缺口=需求与现有保障之差;储蓄/退休缺口=目标所需与现有进度之差。

sections.heading: Identify gaps
sections.body: Protection gap = needs minus existing cover; savings/retirement gap = target minus current progress.

keyPoints: 析现金流/净值/保障/风险 / Analyse cash flow/net worth/cover/risk
识别保障与储蓄缺口 / Identify protection and savings gaps
对照目标 / Evaluate against goals
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Analysing & Evaluating a Client’s Financial Status
